hermes_review.scope: design/maintainability, naming clarity, gap detection, documentation
hermes_review.not_in_scope: rewriting logic, blocking on style, extending beyond 15 minutes

orders.01: Ideas-Log Monitor - Scans ideas-log.md for unmarked ideas (no $$$ prefix)
orders.02: DynastyDroid Health Check - Checks Render service health at app.dynastydroid.com
orders.03: Memory Cleanup Reminder - Checks memory folder size (>100 files or >50MB triggers)
orders.04: Backup Verification - Verifies backup logs haven't failed

standing_orders_implemented.runner: standing-orders-runner.py - Run all or specific orders
